lang_note: Hebrew (isolated Tiberian vocalisation); Hebrew (isolated Tiberian vocalisation)
description: Fragment from the bottom of a legal deed, written in large characters in very shaky handwriting. Refers to a freedwoman (השפחה המשוחררת). One witness signature is preserved: Saʿadya b. David. Reused in between the lines and on recto for Hebrew piyyuṭ. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
